headline: Anthropic released the Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 model family, driving a wave of demonstrations across simulation, design, and code generation.
body: Anthropic made Fable 5 and the guardrailed Mythos 5 generally available, with Fable 5 offered at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22 before shifting to usage credits. A cluster of capability demos accompanied the launch: Fable 5 autonomously played Factorio, simulated the solar system to predict eclipses from physics first principles, set a fluid simulation to Beethoven, and built a browser-based CAD editor with a 3D modeling copilot. The rotation reflects this, with design, 3D spatial consistency, fluid simulation, and centralized planning all leading, and generative AI, design, and 3D spatial consistency breaking out. Separately, a RunPod talk covered decorator-based GPU cloud deployment, and a Turbopuffer talk argued RAG remains viable through broadened retrieval and vector search.
